nyc.label: New York City
nyc.today_detail: Rain showers likely before 2pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 62, with temperatures falling to around 60 in the afternoon. South wind 7 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
nyc.tonight_forecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy

miami.label: Miami
miami.today_detail: Sunny, with a high near 96. Heat index values as high as 100. Southwest wind 1 to 7 mph.
